{{Infobox artifact
| name = Books of Seven Pages
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] failed to bond with any of the [[Books of Seven Pages]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Book of Seven Pages is a book [[Lindon]] was interested in.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Books of Seven Pages]] are kept in a [[library]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Book of Seven Pages is an item [[Pride]] uses to fill himself with power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
